author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
FINAL FANTASY XIV – Gameplay Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
FINAL FANTASY XIV is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in Aug 2026. 

Embark on a quest to deliver the land from an eternity of Darkness alongside more than 30 million adventurers worldwide!   
      
#NintendoSwitch2 #FFXIV #NintendoSwitch

Visit https://ninten.do/6056vgnLI for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 + Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
Join us on June 9 at 7am PT / 10am ET for Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 followed immediately by Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026.
 
The livestream kicks off with Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026, which will run for roughly 50 minutes and highlight upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch games. Immediately following, Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026 will premiere and last around 95 minutes, showcasing gameplay of select titles featured during the Nintendo Direct.

00:00 - Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
56:36 - Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026

#NintendoDirect #NintendoTreehouseLive

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

text:
Star Fox – GameChat Multiplayer Gameplay – Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
Star Fox releases June 25, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2. Pre-order now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/star-fox-switch-2/

Hop into the cockpit with Nintendo Treehouse: Live and get a look at Star Fox multiplayer via GameChat! There are some pretty cool AR filters and avatars too.

Rhythm Heaven Groove – Gameplay Video – Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
Rhythm Heaven Groove releases July 2, 2026 on Nintendo Switch. Pre-order now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/rhythm-heaven-groove-switch/

Tap your feet and follow along as the Nintendo Treehouse: Live team finds the beat in Rhythm Heaven Groove! You’ll get to see both single-player and multiplayer challenges.

Splatoon Raiders – Gameplay Video – Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
Splatoon Raiders releases July 23, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2. Pre-order now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/splatoon-raiders-switch-2/

Venture to the Spirhalite Islands with the Nintendo Treehouse: Live crew in Splatoon Raiders! This deep dive into gameplay features Deep Cut, new Salmonids, and plenty of treasure of course.

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition – Overview Trailer
Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition is available now on Nintendo eShop: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/xenoblade-chronicles-definitive-edition-nintendo-switch-2-edition-switch-2/

Enjoy this critically acclaimed RPG with enhancements and additions! The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of this game features improved visuals, smoother and sharper cutscenes, and more content for you to enjoy! Race across the Bionis and Mechonis on the high-powered Ether Jet—both in the main game and in the Future Connected epilogue—unlock additional equipment, experience fully voiced Heart-to-Heart conversations for the first time, and more.

Nintendo Switch 2 players who already have Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition on Nintendo Switch can upgrade to the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition by purchasing the upgrade pack.

#XenobladeChronicles #NintendoSwitch2

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
